summary: Iteration 5: Tested 3 new features — server refactor, policy crawler, and attachment button. All backend APIs pass (10/10). All frontend flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: API responses are inconsistent: /api/sessions returns {sessions:[...]}, /api/emails returns {emails:[], total:0}, /api/policy/docs returns {docs:[...]} — all wrapped in objects. Frontend handles this but consider standardizing.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Alberta.ca policy doc crawled and deleted during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: (1) Security gate BENJI works, (2) Claude Sonnet 4.5 responds, (3) Paperclip attachment button uploads .txt files and shows chip, message sends with [ATTACHED FILE: test.txt] prefix, (4) EmailPanel has Refs+Policy Docs tabs, URL crawl form works, Alberta.ca crawled successfully showing title + word_count, delete works. Backend routes refactored into separate files all responding correctly.
